de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Class Notation.ModalSVNotation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.Notation
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.Notation.ModalSVNotation
  • Enclosing class:
    Notation

    public static final class Notation.ModalSVNotation
extends Notation
    The concrete syntax for DL modalities represented with a SchemaVariable.

    • Method Detail

      • print

        public void print(Term t,
                  LogicPrinter sp)
           throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from class: Notation
        Print a term to a LogicPrinter. Concrete subclasses override this to call one of the printXYZTerm of LogicPrinter, which do the layout.
        Specified by:
        print in class Notation
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
